text: Stepping inside this space, I am immediately struck by the contrast between the cool austerity of the exterior hallway and the vibrant surrealism of this R+D room. The colors—an electric interplay of orange and blue—invigorate my senses and spark a heightened awareness. I feel suspended in a liminal zone dedicated to thought and experiment, a place curated for creative collision and careful observation. Surrounded by symbols of research and development, I experience a subtle thrill: the architecture and design are invitations to inquiry. Here, in this intersection of artifice and intention, I sense an atmosphere both expectant and oddly calm, as if I have entered a pocket of possibility nestled within the broader world.
